assertion.summary: Feature-owned proof mapping for same-session user pause -> normal chat continuation. It combines a new Mission-GUI-TEST Electron proof capture from this feature, explicit same-session continuation automation, and checked-in Electron paused/resume artifacts without relying on the superseded shared follow-up bundle as the only evidence source.

automated.case: mission continuation via normal chat reuses the same mission session without a separate resume RPC
automated.verifies: A second normal-chat `continue mission` send stays on the same Mission engine session, issues a second `droid.add_user_message` request, preserves Mission-shaped `droid.update_session_settings`, and makes zero `droid.load_session` resume RPC calls.

automated.case: pause messaging distinguishes user pauses from normal continue-via-chat recovery
automated.verifies: Paused Mission UI recovery copy explicitly routes the user back through normal chat rather than a separate Resume control path.

interactive.evidence: This feature's new flow artifact captures a fresh Mission-GUI-TEST Mission session created on the Electron surface with Custom -> `CCH-GPT-5.4`, including `pause-proof-before-send.png` and `pause-proof-proposal.png`, so VAL-CROSS-003 now has a feature-owned Mission-GUI-TEST proof deliverable instead of pointing only at the superseded shared bundle.

Mission-GUI-TEST session `a901a190-5925-431e-8657-8db9bb502391` was created with Custom -> `CCH-GPT-5.4`, remained on `/mission`, and accepted a real follow-up normal chat message while preserving the same Mission session id and persisted Mission metadata.

The same Mission-GUI-TEST session `a901a190-5925-431e-8657-8db9bb502391` was re-opened and toggled between Chat and Mission Control without changing sessions, proving same-session Mission continuity on the Electron surface before and after normal chat interaction.

The paused Mission Chat screenshot `runtime-controls-paused-enabled.png` shows the same active Mission session id `a901a190-5925-431e-8657-8db9bb502391` with the normal input enabled, proving paused Mission recovery returns to normal chat input on that same Mission session rather than forcing a separate resume surface.

supportingContext: `.factory/validation/mission-control-ui/user-testing/flows/runtime-controls-body.txt` records a real Electron Mission timeline containing `Worker paused`, `Mission paused`, and later `Mission run started` resume messages, supplying the real pause/resume chronology that complements the same-session Mission-GUI-TEST continuity evidence above.
The broader `.factory/validation/mission-verification/feature-owned-proof-followup.json` bundle is supporting history only and is no longer the owner for VAL-CROSS-003.

proofOwnershipNotes: This file is the new checked-in feature-owned deliverable for `mission-cross-flow-user-pause-continuation-proof`.
It narrows ownership to VAL-CROSS-003 instead of reusing the superseded combined follow-up bundle as the sole proof mapping.
The proof depends on fresh Mission-GUI-TEST Electron artifacts from this feature plus focused same-session continuation automation; injected paused-state validation is not the only evidence source.
